Headline: #57 Laramie Temporary Reroute at Laramie/Grand
ShortDescription: #57 Laramie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to, street blockage near Laramie/Grand.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#57 Laramie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to, street blockage near Laramie/Grand.

#57 Laramie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Laramie, North Avenue, Cicero, and Grand into the terminal. 

Allow extra travel time.
